{{Quote|Subject wanted for the piracy of several freighters.|The bounty posting for Ganz by the Techno Union|<ref name="BH" />}}
'''Keejik Ganz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] who was affiliated with [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla Besadii the Elder]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The criminal stole several [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] from the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] who placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head for the crime. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] the bounty was claimed by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who encountered Ganz on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Biography==
Keejik Ganz was a criminal who became involved in several acts of [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] involving the theft of [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] from the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]], a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]]. As a result of his crimes Ganz had a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] placed on his head by the Union, who offered 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for his capture alive and 1,500 credits for his [[Death/Legends|death]]. Ganz became affiliated with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|Crime lord]] [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla Besadii the Elder]], who dwelt on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] where Ganz also began to work. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] Ganz was on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] world, working in the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] close to [[Imperial Station Bravo|Gardulla's palace]] where large numbers of her thugs were involved in fights with the native [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] population. While Ganz was located near the Hutt's palace, the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] traveled to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in search of a Hutt affiliated with the secret cult known as the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]], whose leader [[Komari Vosa]] had a large bounty on her head. A rival of Gardulla's named [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] directed Fett to his foes palace as it was she who worked with the cult.<ref name="BH" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
Whilst Fett made his way to Gardulla's palace through the canyons of the Dune Sea he encountered Ganz. Upon learning of the bounty on the Weequay Fett subdued him and captured him alive claiming the 3,000 credits from the Union.<ref name="BH" />
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
Keejik Ganz was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] and like all members of his species had wrinkled [[Color/Legends|brown]] skin and black hair, which he wore loose down to his shoulders.<ref name="BH" />

==Equipment==
Whilst fighting in the Dune Sea Ganz used a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and wore [[Armor/Legends|armor]] in combat.<ref name="BH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Keejik Ganz first appeared in [[December]] [[2002]] in the [[LucasArts]] dveloped [[Star Wars video games|video game]], ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
